meta.description: In-house round-toe men's dress last template, RIGHT foot, built natively at 25 mm heel pitch. First entry in the shoeforge template library. All values mm; x-positions are fractions of stick length (heel=0, toe=1).
meta.built_at: UK 9 F dimensions (morph corrections expected to be small)

bottom_profile_z.comment: z of the feather/bottom along the length; ground plane z=0; tread touches near the ball

outline_y_medial.comment: medial (negative-Y) feather edge; right last: medial edge relatively straight through the big-toe joint

outline_y_lateral.comment: lateral (positive-Y) feather edge; curved, 5th-met bulge slightly behind the medial joint

top_profile_z.comment: crown height along the length: back curve top -> cone peak (thimble region) -> instep -> falls over ball/toe box to the tip

dome_power.comment: cos^p dome exponent per station: <1 fuller/squarer walls (heel, cone), >1 more tapered (toe box)

crown_shift_y.comment: medial (negative) crown offset: the cone leans slightly medial over the arch; corners unaffected
